---
name: New skill request
about: Suggest a new AI skill to add to this template
title: "[Skill] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Skill name**
Proposed kebab-case name for the skill (e.g. `image-generation`).

**Description**
What capability should this skill provide to an AI agent?

**Input parameters**
List the key input parameters, their types, and whether they are required.

**Return values**
List the key values the skill should return.

**Use cases**
Describe one or two concrete scenarios where an agent would invoke this skill.

**Additional context**
Add any relevant links, examples from other frameworks, or prior art here.
